label: Presentation Mode toggle (back-btn)
expected_behavior: Toggles a light brand 'presentation' view for in-person walkthroughs; flips aria-pressed and applies/removes presentation styling (window.togglePresentationMode).
notes: Top header back-bar button.

label: Back to dashboard (← arrow)
expected_behavior: Navigates to dashboard.html (the CRM dashboard / kanban).

label: Lead Intelligence SCORE chip
expected_behavior: Expands/collapses the lead-score breakdown panel (#leadScorePanel) showing the 0-100 score composition (engagement/stage/recency/portal signals).
notes: Hidden until score>0; chip color/dot reflect tier.

label: Referred by <name> badge
expected_behavior: Opens the referring customer's record (navigates to the customer page for lead.referredByLeadId).
notes: Only shown for referral-sourced leads.

label: Call (quick-actions)
expected_behavior: Opens the device dialer with the customer's phone number (href set to tel: at load).

label: Book Inspection (SMS)
expected_behavior: Opens native SMS composer pre-filled with an inspection booking link to the customer phone.
notes: Opens composer only; user still sends. Hidden until booking link set.

label: Email (quick-actions)
expected_behavior: Opens default mail client to the customer's email address.

label: Copy Booking Link
expected_behavior: Copies the inspection booking link to the clipboard and toasts confirmation.
notes: Hidden until a booking link exists.

label: Customer Report (📄)
expected_behavior: Generates and exports a branded customer report as a PDF for this lead (window.exportCustomerPDF).
notes: Lazy-loads jsPDF/html2pdf bundle.

label: Edit Info (✏️)
expected_behavior: Opens the Edit Customer modal pre-populated with the lead's contact + job fields.

label: → Move to Next Stage
expected_behavior: Advances the lead to the next stage in its per-track pipeline (insurance/cash/finance/warranty/service) and logs a stage-change timeline event (window.progressStage).
reveal_state: after:stage-resolved (display:none until current stage known; hidden at terminal stages)
notes: Core stage-transition control. May be gated by required-field checks on certain transitions.

label: Copy Portal Link
expected_behavior: Auto-generates the full project portal link if missing, copies it to clipboard, toasts; falls back to opening the share panel on failure.

label: Text Portal Link
expected_behavior: Opens native SMS composer to the customer phone with the portal link + greeting pre-filled.
notes: Composer only — user sends manually.

label: Email Portal Link
expected_behavior: Opens default mail client to the customer email with subject + body containing the portal link pre-filled.
notes: Composer only — user sends manually.

label: Preview Portal
expected_behavior: Opens an in-page preview of the customer-facing portal (same-origin) so the rep sees exactly what the homeowner sees.

label: Open Gallery Share panel
expected_behavior: Reveals the inline gallery/portal share panel containing photo-gallery and full-portal link generators.

label: Close (gallery share panel)
expected_behavior: Collapses/hides the gallery share panel.

label: Photo gallery share link field
expected_behavior: Read-only field that displays the generated photo-gallery share URL.
notes: readonly.

label: Generate (photo portal)
expected_behavior: Generates a shareable photo-gallery portal link and writes it into #photoPortalUrl.

label: Copy photo portal URL (📋)
expected_behavior: Copies the value of #photoPortalUrl to the clipboard.

label: Preview photo portal (👁)
expected_behavior: Opens a preview of the photo-gallery customer portal view for this customer (CustomerPortal.preview).
notes: data-pass-customer-id.

label: Full project portal share link field
expected_behavior: Read-only field that displays the generated full-project portal share URL.
notes: readonly.

label: Generate (full portal)
expected_behavior: Generates a full-project portal share link and writes it into #fullPortalUrl.

label: Copy full portal URL (📋)
expected_behavior: Copies the value of #fullPortalUrl to the clipboard.

label: Preview full portal (👁)
expected_behavior: Opens a preview of the full-project customer portal view for this customer (CustomerPortal.preview).
notes: data-pass-customer-id.

label: Photo Report (picker)
expected_behavior: Opens the Photo Report style picker modal (Homeowner vs Adjuster report).

label: Send Review Request (SMS)
expected_behavior: Sends a Google review request to the customer via SMS (ReviewEngine.sendReviewSMS), passing the customer id.
notes: Server-side SMS send — drive to confirm boundary only.

label: Send Referral Code (SMS)
expected_behavior: Generates a referral code for the customer and sends it via SMS (window._sendReferralCodeAndSms).
notes: Server-side SMS send — drive to confirm boundary only.

label: Overview (tab)
expected_behavior: Switches the tabbed content to the Overview tab (Documents/Estimates/Notes summary).
notes: Hash-routed tab.

label: Photos (tab)
expected_behavior: Switches the tabbed content to the Photos tab (project photo grid + filters).

label: Documents (tab)
expected_behavior: Switches the tabbed content to the Documents tab (template cards + signed-doc upload + generated docs).

label: Voice Intel (tab)
expected_behavior: Switches to the Voice Intelligence tab; mounts the voice-intel widget (#voiceIntelRoot) for record/upload + AI extraction.
notes: Tab body content rendered by external voice-intel JS into #voiceIntelRoot (line 1799); record/upload controls live there.

label: Messages (tab, with unread badge)
expected_behavior: Switches to the portal Messages tab (two-way rep↔homeowner chat); unread badge (#msgUnreadBadge) shows count.

label: Timeline (tab)
expected_behavior: Switches to the Timeline tab (project milestones + customer portal activity log).

label: Contact (tab)
expected_behavior: Switches to the Contact & Notes tab (contractor info + quick-contact + communication log).

label: Add Task (timeline header)
expected_behavior: Opens the Add Task modal to create a new task for this lead.
notes: Also appears in empty-state of timeline (Add First Task) at customer.html:3864.

label: Timeline filter pills (All / Stage Changes / Photos / Tasks / Documents / Notes)
expected_behavior: Filters the timeline list to the selected event type and toggles the active pill (filterTimeline, data-pass-el).
notes: Representative of 6 pills (all/stage/photo/task/document/note); de-duped.

label: Show all items (timeline collapse toggle)
expected_behavior: Expands/collapses the timeline between showing only the last 5 items and the full list.
notes: Collapse default is last-5 (window._tlCollapsed=true).

label: Timeline task done checkbox
expected_behavior: Toggles the task's done state (toggleTask) and strikes through the task title.
notes: Repeats per task timeline row; one representative. Clicking the row (not the checkbox) also toggles (customer.html:3868).

label: Upload (timeline/photos header)
expected_behavior: Opens the photo Upload modal (file picker + drag-drop zone).
notes: Same action recurs at lines 1481, 1572 (drop zone), 1895 (widget reopen), 3955/3988/4089 (dynamic empty-states); de-duped to one.

label: Create document (📝)
expected_behavior: Opens the Create Document modal (searchable template picker) to generate a doc for this customer.
notes: Recurs at 1269,1735,1744,2508,6755 empty-states; de-duped.

label: Upload document (📤)
expected_behavior: Opens the Document Upload modal (file picker for PDF/DOC/XLS/images).
notes: Recurs at 1736 and drop-zone 3542; de-duped.

label: Log Estimate
expected_behavior: Opens the Log Estimate modal to record a manual estimate (type/amount/notes).

label: Build Estimate
expected_behavior: Navigates to the dashboard estimate builder with this lead pre-loaded.

label: Estimate row (open viewer)
expected_behavior: Opens the Estimate Viewer modal showing the estimate's line items, notes and pricing.
notes: Repeats per estimate; one representative.

label: Export estimate PDF (📤)
expected_behavior: Exports the estimate as a PDF (exportCustomerEstimate).
notes: Repeats per estimate row; one representative.

label: Share estimate view link (🔗)
expected_behavior: Copies the customer-facing estimate view link to clipboard (shareEstimateViewLink).
notes: Repeats per estimate row; one representative.

label: Generate warranty certificate (🛡️)
expected_behavior: Generates a Warranty Certificate document from the estimate (generateCertFromEstimate).
notes: Repeats per estimate row; one representative.

label: Open larger editor (notes)
expected_behavior: Opens the full Notes modal for multi-paragraph note entry.

label: Quick note textarea
expected_behavior: Inline note text entry; Cmd/Ctrl+Enter (customer.html:2734) or Send posts the note. maxlength 2000.

label: Send (quick note)
expected_behavior: Posts the quick note to the lead with an optimistic insert at the top of the notes list (window.quickAddNote).

label: Review & Sort (✦)
expected_behavior: Navigates to the dedicated photo Review Sprint screen (photo-review.html?id=<leadId>).
notes: href id appended at load.

label: Share Gallery (photos header)
expected_behavior: Generates/copies a shareable photo gallery link for the customer (ShareGallery.generate, passes customer id).

label: Photo filter buttons (All / Before / During / After / Annotated)
expected_behavior: Filters the photo grid to the chosen phase/annotated set and marks the button active (filterPhotos, data-pass-el).
notes: Representative of 5 filter buttons; de-duped.

label: Select (bulk photo mode)
expected_behavior: Enters/exits bulk photo-selection mode, revealing the bulk phase/damage/severity selects and Delete/Cancel controls.

label: Bulk phase select
expected_behavior: Applies the chosen phase (Before/During/After) to all selected photos then resets the selector (_applyBulkPhotoUpdateAndReset).

label: Bulk damage-type select
expected_behavior: Applies the chosen damage type to all selected photos then resets the selector (_applyBulkPhotoUpdateAndReset).

label: Bulk severity select
expected_behavior: Applies the chosen severity to all selected photos then resets the selector (_applyBulkPhotoUpdateAndReset).

label: Delete (bulk photos)
expected_behavior: Deletes all currently selected photos (applyBulkPhotoDelete) after confirmation.
notes: Destructive — drive to confirm boundary only.

label: Cancel (bulk photos)
expected_behavior: Exits bulk photo-select mode without changes (exitPhotoSelectMode).

label: Show all photos (expand)
expected_behavior: Expands/collapses the customer photo grid to show all photos vs the truncated set (toggleCustomerPhotosExpanded).
notes: Dynamically rendered.

label: Generate Report (photos)
expected_behavior: Generates a photo report PDF for the customer (generatePhotoReport, passes customer id).
notes: Dynamically rendered in photo grid footer.

label: Reorder (photos)
expected_behavior: Enters/exits photo reorder mode allowing drag-reordering of customer photos (toggleCustomerPhotoReorder).
notes: Dynamically rendered.

label: Show all in phase (<label> (n total))
expected_behavior: Expands a per-phase photo group to show all photos in that phase (handled by delegate at customer.html:6485).
notes: Repeats per phase; one representative.

label: Share / ✓ Shared photo badge
expected_behavior: Toggles whether the photo is shared on the customer portal gallery (delegate at customer.html:6477).
notes: Repeats per photo; one representative.

selector: img.lightbox-img / photo thumbnail (opens photo action popup)
label: Photo thumbnail (open action popup)
expected_behavior: Opens the per-photo action popup (phase/severity/damage/location/description quick-edit + Preview/Open Editor/Delete).
notes: Popup content built dynamically; repeats per photo.

label: Close photo action popup (×)
expected_behavior: Closes the per-photo action popup.

label: Quick set phase (photo popup)
expected_behavior: Sets the photo's phase to the chosen value (quickSetPhase, data-pass-el).
notes: One representative of the phase button group.

label: Damage type select (photo popup)
expected_behavior: Saves the photo's damage-type metadata on change (quickSaveMeta).

label: Quick set severity (photo popup)
expected_behavior: Sets the photo's severity to the chosen value (quickSetSeverity, data-pass-el).
notes: One representative of the severity button group.

label: Location select (photo popup)
expected_behavior: Saves the photo's location metadata on change (quickSaveMeta).

label: Description input (photo popup)
expected_behavior: Saves the photo's description metadata on change (quickSaveMeta).

label: Preview (photo popup, 👁)
expected_behavior: Opens the photo in the lightbox preview from the action popup (_previewPhotoFromPopup).

label: Open Editor (photo popup)
expected_behavior: Opens the photo in the annotation editor and closes the popup (_openPhotoInEditorAndClose).

label: Delete (photo popup)
expected_behavior: Deletes the single photo (window.deletePhoto at customer.html:7039) after confirmation.
notes: Destructive — drive to confirm boundary only.

label: Document template card (Proposal / Contract / Work Auth / Scope / Inspection / Supplement / Warranty / COC / Invoice / Change Order / Before-After / Financing / Company Intro / Referral Card)
expected_behavior: Generates the selected document type for the customer via NBDDocGen (window.generateCustomerDoc at customer.html:7409).
notes: Representative of 16 template cards (data-doc-type: proposal, contract, work_authorization, scope_of_work, inspectionHomeowner, inspectionInsurance, supplement_request, warranty_certificate, certificate_of_completion, invoice, change_order, before_after_report, financing_options, company_intro, referral_card). De-duped.

label: Preview blank template (ⓘ)
expected_behavior: Opens a same-origin srcdoc preview of the blank template for the doc type (_previewBlankDoc).
notes: Repeats per template card; one representative.

label: Upload signed doc - Camera
expected_behavior: Triggers the capture-enabled file input (#signedDocFileInput) to photograph a signed document.

label: Upload signed doc - File
expected_behavior: Triggers the browse file input (#signedDocBrowseInput) to upload a signed document from device.

label: Signed doc camera file input
expected_behavior: On file selection, uploads the captured signed document (handleSignedDocUpload).
notes: Hidden; triggered programmatically.

label: Signed doc browse file input
expected_behavior: On file selection, uploads the browsed signed document (handleSignedDocUpload).
notes: Hidden; triggered programmatically.

label: Regenerate (generated doc)
expected_behavior: Re-runs generateCustomerDoc for the doc type to regenerate a previously generated document (customer.html:7631).
notes: Repeats per generated doc; one representative.

label: View (generated/shared document)
expected_behavior: Opens the generated/shared document URL in a new tab (target=_blank).
notes: Repeats per doc; one representative.

label: Pay (invoice document)
expected_behavior: Opens the invoice/payment URL in a new tab for the customer to pay (target=_blank).
notes: Only on invoice docs with a payment URL.

label: View (shared report)
expected_behavior: Opens the shared report at the given index (delegate wired at customer.html:6732).
notes: Repeats per report; one representative.

label: Reply textarea (portal messages)
expected_behavior: Composes the rep's reply to the homeowner; enables the Send reply button when non-empty (sendBtn at customer.html:8512). maxlength 2000.

label: Send reply (portal messages)
expected_behavior: Sends the composed reply into the portal message thread (rep→homeowner); disabled until text is entered.
notes: Writes a message customers see on their portal — drive to confirm boundary only.

label: Voice Intelligence widget (record/upload + AI extract)
expected_behavior: Mount point for the voice-intel widget; record or upload call audio → AI extracts damage notes, objections, commitments, insurance details, red flags.
notes: Inner controls (record / upload / process) are injected by external voice-intel JS, not in customer.html markup; inventory the rendered controls at test time. Marked send (AI processing) — exercise to confirm boundary.

label: Call (contact tab quick-contact)
expected_behavior: Opens the device dialer to the customer's phone number.
notes: Duplicate of header Call; quick-contact variant.

label: Text (contact tab quick-contact)
expected_behavior: Opens the native SMS composer to the customer's phone number.
notes: Composer only.

label: Email (contact tab quick-contact)
expected_behavior: Opens the default mail client to the customer's email address.

label: Lightbox close (×)
expected_behavior: Closes the photo lightbox overlay (closeLightbox).

label: Lightbox previous (‹)
expected_behavior: Shows the previous photo in the lightbox (prevPhoto).

label: Lightbox next (›)
expected_behavior: Shows the next photo in the lightbox (nextPhoto).

label: Upload modal close (×) / Cancel
expected_behavior: Closes the photo Upload modal (closeUploadModal).
notes: Close × and Cancel button both call closeUploadModal.

label: Photo file input
expected_behavior: On selection, stages chosen image files into the upload queue and reveals the Upload button (_handleFileSelectFromEl).
notes: Accepts image/heic/heif/avif, multiple.

label: Upload drop zone (click to choose files)
expected_behavior: Triggers the hidden #fileInput file picker (_triggerFileInput); also a drag-drop target.

label: Upload (photos submit)
expected_behavior: Uploads the queued photos to storage + Firestore for the lead (window.uploadPhotos at customer.html:4890).

label: Remove from upload queue (×)
expected_behavior: Removes a single staged file from the upload queue before submit (window.removeFromQueue at customer.html:4885 / nbd-remove-doc wiring at customer.html:2404).
notes: Repeats per queued file; one representative.

label: View details (upload progress widget)
expected_behavior: Reopens the Upload modal to view in-progress upload details (openUploadModal).

label: Document file input (upload modal)
expected_behavior: Selects document files (PDF/DOC/DOCX/XLS/XLSX/JPG/PNG) to stage for upload; reveals the Upload Documents button.
notes: multiple.

label: Upload Documents (submit)
expected_behavior: Uploads the staged documents to storage + Firestore for the lead (window.uploadDocuments at customer.html:2414).

label: Cancel / close doc upload modal
expected_behavior: Closes the Document Upload modal (closeDocUploadModal).

label: Close create-document modal (×)
expected_behavior: Closes the Create Document template-picker modal (closeDocCreateModal).

label: Template search (create-document modal)
expected_behavior: Filters the document template list as the rep types (e.g. invoice, contract, warranty).

label: See full document library →
expected_behavior: Expands the create-document modal to show the full template library (_seeAllDocTemplates).

label: Pick template (create-document modal card)
expected_behavior: Selects the template in the create-doc modal and proceeds to generate that document type (_pickCustomerDoc).
notes: Repeats per template; one representative. Has its own ⓘ preview (_previewBlankDoc) at customer.html:7354.

label: Note textarea (Notes modal)
expected_behavior: Multi-paragraph note entry; saved via the Save Note button.

label: Save Note (Notes modal)
expected_behavior: Saves the note text to the lead and refreshes the notes list (window.saveNote at customer.html:2598).

label: Cancel / close Notes modal
expected_behavior: Closes the Notes modal without saving (closeNotesModal).

label: Estimate type select
expected_behavior: Selects the estimate type recorded with the manual estimate.

label: Estimate amount input
expected_behavior: Captures the estimate dollar amount for the manual estimate.

label: Estimate notes textarea
expected_behavior: Optional free-text notes recorded with the manual estimate.

label: Save Estimate (Log Estimate modal)
expected_behavior: Saves the manual estimate (type/amount/notes) to the lead's estimates and refreshes the estimate list (saveEstimate).

label: Cancel / close Log Estimate modal
expected_behavior: Closes the Log Estimate modal without saving (closeEstimateModal).

label: Edit in Builder (Estimate Viewer)
expected_behavior: Navigates to dashboard.html?edit=<customerId>&est=<estimateId> to edit the estimate in the dashboard builder (customer.html:5189).
notes: Wired imperatively (onclick) when viewer opens.

label: Archive (Estimate Viewer)
expected_behavior: Soft-deletes the estimate (sets deleted:true + deletedAt, never hard-deletes) after confirm, then closes viewer and reloads estimates (customer.html:5194).
notes: Confirm('Archive this estimate?') — soft delete only; drive to confirm boundary.

label: Close (Estimate Viewer) ✕ / Close
expected_behavior: Closes the Estimate Viewer modal (closeEstimateViewerModal).
notes: Both the ✕ and the Close button call closeEstimateViewerModal.

label: Task title input
expected_behavior: Captures the new task's title.

label: Task due date input
expected_behavior: Sets the task's due date.

label: Task priority select
expected_behavior: Sets the task's priority level.

label: Task notes textarea
expected_behavior: Optional additional details for the task.

label: Save Task (Task modal)
expected_behavior: Creates the task (title/due/priority/notes) on the lead and refreshes the timeline (window.saveTask at customer.html:5843).

label: Cancel / close Task modal (× and Cancel)
expected_behavior: Closes the Add Task modal without saving (closeTaskModal).
notes: Both the × and Cancel button call closeTaskModal.

label: Close photo report picker (×)
expected_behavior: Closes the Photo Report style picker modal (closePhotoReportPicker).

label: Homeowner report (picker card)
expected_behavior: Generates the Homeowner-style photo report (pickPhotoReport with arg 'homeowner').

label: Adjuster report (picker card)
expected_behavior: Generates the Adjuster-style photo report (pickPhotoReport with arg 'adjuster').

label: Close / Cancel Edit Customer modal
expected_behavior: Closes the Edit Customer modal without saving (closeEditCustomerModal).

label: Edit first name
expected_behavior: Edits the customer's first name (saved on Save Changes).

label: Edit last name
expected_behavior: Edits the customer's last name (saved on Save Changes).

label: Edit phone
expected_behavior: Edits the customer's phone number (saved on Save Changes).

label: Edit email
expected_behavior: Edits the customer's email address (saved on Save Changes).

label: Edit address
expected_behavior: Edits the customer's property address (saved on Save Changes).

label: Edit damage type
expected_behavior: Edits the damage type field (e.g. Roof - Hail) (saved on Save Changes).

label: Edit job value
expected_behavior: Edits the job value dollar amount (saved on Save Changes).

label: Save Changes (Edit Customer modal)
expected_behavior: Persists the edited customer contact + job fields to the lead and refreshes the page (saveCustomerEdits at customer.html:8280).

label: AI draft reply text (editable)
expected_behavior: Editable AI-generated reply draft; edited text is what gets sent on Approve & Send (customer-ai-drafts-panel.js:143).
reveal_state: after:pending-AI-drafts-exist (panel injected by customer-ai-drafts-panel.js; hidden if none)
notes: Panel mounted dynamically near .quick-actions; repeats per draft.

label: Approve & Send (AI draft)
expected_behavior: Sends the (edited) AI draft reply to the homeowner from the business line and clears the draft (customer-ai-drafts-panel.js approve action).
notes: Server-side SMS/email send — drive to confirm boundary only. Repeats per draft.

label: Dismiss (AI draft)
expected_behavior: Discards the AI draft so it won't be sent and removes the card (customer-ai-drafts-panel.js dismiss action).
notes: Repeats per draft.

label: Call (smart follow-up suggestion)
expected_behavior: Opens the dialer to the customer phone and tracks the follow-up outcome (customer-smart-followup-panel.js:243).
notes: Only when a suggestion is present and phone exists.

label: SMS (smart follow-up suggestion)
expected_behavior: Sends/opens an SMS to the customer with the suggested draft and tracks the follow-up outcome (customer-smart-followup-panel.js wireActions ~209).
notes: Drive to confirm boundary only.

label: Email (smart follow-up suggestion)
expected_behavior: Composes/sends an email to the customer with the suggested draft and tracks the follow-up outcome (customer-smart-followup-panel.js wireActions ~209).
notes: Drive to confirm boundary only.

label: Dismiss (smart follow-up suggestion)
expected_behavior: Dismisses the follow-up suggestion for this session and hides the panel (customer-smart-followup-panel.js dismiss).

label: Lead Scoring panel
expected_behavior: Renders the lead-score breakdown panel for the lead (LeadScoring.renderScorePanel at customer.html:3565); may contain expandable score-detail controls.
notes: Inner controls rendered by external js/lead-scoring; inventory rendered controls at test time.

label: Insurance Claim Workflow panel
expected_behavior: Renders the insurance claim workflow / step controls for the lead (InsuranceClaim.renderClaimWorkflow at customer.html:3572).
notes: Inner step buttons rendered by external js/insurance-claim; inventory rendered controls at test time.

label: Job Costs & Profit panel
expected_behavior: Renders the job costs/profit tracker panel for the lead (ProfitTracker.renderCostPanel at customer.html:3558); may contain cost add/edit controls.
notes: Inner controls rendered by external js/profit-tracker; inventory rendered controls at test time.
